channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Texas is No. 1 in women's AP Top 25 for the first time in 21 years; NC State climbs into top 10
item.description: Texas is No. 1 in The Associated Press Top 25 women's basketball poll for the first time in 21 years and became the third different team to hold the top spot in the past three weeks. The Longhorns moved atop the poll Monday after previous No. 1 Notre Dame lost in double overtime to N.C.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Morrissey, Scheifele rally Jets to 2-1 overtime win over Sharks for 10th straight
item.description: WINNIPEG, Manitoba (AP) — Josh Morrissey scored the tying goal in the final minute of regulation and Mark Scheifele got the winner 1:33 into overtime as the Winnipeg Jets rallied to beat the San Jose Sharks 2-1 on Monday night for their franchise-record 10th straight win.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Galatasaray accuses Jose Mourinho of making racist comments after Turkish league game
item.description: ISTANBUL (AP) — Galatasaray plans to start criminal proceedings against Jose Mourinho and file complaints with soccer's governing body after accusing the Fenerbahce coach of making racist comments after a Turkish league game.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: An unidentified team has proposed banning the tush push used so successfully by the Eagles
item.description: INDIANAPOLIS (AP) — One NFL team is proposing an end to the tush push play the Philadelphia Eagles have used so successfully at the goal line and in short-yardage situations, including during their victory over the Kansas City Chiefs in Super Bowl 59.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles will accept White House visit as soon as President Trump extends invite
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles will accept a White House invite from President Donald Trump to celebrate their Super Bowl LIX victory over the Kansas City Chiefs.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Luka Doncic's new Lakers teammates say he's ready to face the Mavericks 3 weeks after the trade
item.description: EL SEGUNDO, Calif. (AP) — Just over three weeks after the trade that stunned the sports world, Luka Doncic and his Los Angeles Lakers will host the Dallas Mavericks on Tuesday night.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: University of Utah fires head basketball coach Craig Smith
item.description: The University of Utah has fired the head coach of its men's basketball program, Craig Smith. Assistant coach Josh Eilert will take over for the remainder of the season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Rainy Monday in Florida leads to all but one Grapefruit League spring training game being canceled
item.description: A rainy day in Florida resulted in all but one Grapefruit League game being canceled Monday, including the Detroit Tigers having a rainout at their spring training home for the first time since 2016.
item.dc:creator: The Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Chen and Kerrigan are added to cast of a figure skating event benefiting victims of DC plane crash
item.description: Nathan Chen, Nancy Kerrigan and Peggy Fleming are among a bevy of figure skaters added to the cast of a benefit event this weekend in Washington, D.C., for victims of the midair collision and crash outside Ronald Reagan International Airport.
item.dc:creator: STEPHEN WHYNO, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Broncos assistant coach Michael Wilhoite arrested after being accused of punching a police officer
item.description: An assistant coach for the Denver Broncos is facing a felony assault charge after being accused of punching a police officer in the face at Denver International Airport.
item.dc:creator: Arnie Stapleton, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Manaea is expected to miss start of Mets season with oblique strain. Madrigal has fractured shoulder
item.description: PORT ST. LUCIE, Fla. (AP) — New York Mets starter Sean Manaea is expected to begin the season on the injured list because of a right oblique strain. Manaea said Monday that had been dealing with the issue since getting to spring training.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Yankees will play Sinatra's 'New York, New York' only after home wins, returning to original custom
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — The Yankees will play Frank Sinatra's version of the “Theme From New York, New York” only after home wins instead of all games in the Bronx, going back to the original custom set by owner George Steinbrenner in 1980.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: College sports put a twist on team spirit, with signature brews at games and grocers
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Missy Vraney and Kristin Westphal didn't go to Marquette. Neither did any of their relatives. Yet their family tradition of attending Golden Eagles basketball games spans generations.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Ex-Cincinnati men's basketball player Steve Toyloy dead at 37
item.description: Steve Toyloy, a former Cincinnati Bearcats men's basketball player, died at the age of 37, the school announced on Sunday. His cause of death was unclear.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Panthers will not re-sign longtime linebacker Shaq Thompson
item.description: CHARLOTTE, N.C. (AP) — The Carolina Panthers are moving on from longtime linebacker Shaq Thompson. The Panthers informed Thompson, who was set to become an unrestricted free agent, that they will not be re-signing him. Thompson is expected to pursue other options in free agency.
item.dc:creator: STEVE REED, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Guenther scores game-winner in 2-1 victory over Vancouver
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Dylan Guenther scored the tiebreaking goal with 5:53 left in regulation, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Vancouver Canucks 2-1 at Delta Center on Sunday. Guenther scored on the power play by tipping in a backdoor pass from Nick Schmaltz at the left post.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Mystics trade 2-time All-Star Ariel Atkins to the Sky for No. 3 pick in WNBA draft
item.description: CHICAGO (AP) — The Washington Mystics accelerated their rebuild, trading two-time All-Star Ariel Atkins to the Chicago Sky for the No. 3 overall pick in this year's draft on Sunday. Washington also received Chicago's second-round pick in 2027 and the rights to swap first-rounders that year.
item.dc:creator: ANDREW SELIGMAN, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: It turns out Venus Williams won't play at Indian Wells after the tournament announced she would
item.description: INDIAN WELLS, Calif. (AP) — It turns out 44-year-old Venus Williams will not be playing at the BNP Paribas Open, the tournament revealed on Sunday — days after it announced she would be competing there with a wild-card entry.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Fresno State men's basketball players allegedly placed sports bets on games they played in: report
item.description: Fresno State men's basketball players allegedly placed sports bets on games they played in. The university and the NCAA are investigating the matter.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Biyendolo and Cooper score as United States beats Australia 2-1 in SheBelieves Cup
item.description: GLENDALE, Ariz (AP) — Lynn Biyendolo scored 42 seconds into the match and the United States beat Australia 2-1 on Sunday in the SheBelieves Cup. Michelle Cooper scored her first international goal in her second appearance for the U.S., which improved to 2-0 in the four-team round-robin tournament.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Match preview: San Diego FC set to make historic MLS debut against LA Galaxy
item.description: San Diego FC is set to take the field on Sunday for the first time in Major League Soccer, facing off against the reigning MLS Cup champions, LA Galaxy, at Dignity Health Sports Park -- a history making match.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Alex Rodriguez makes half-court shot, wins Bucknell student $10,000
item.description: Former Major League Baseball star Alex Rodriguez showed his skill on the hardwood Sunday, making a half-court shot to win a Bucknell student $10,000.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, Fox 5

item.title: Luxury portable toilets sought after ahead of NFL draft
item.description: The luxury restroom trailers and containers feature flushing toilets, sinks, air conditioning, and even stereo systems.
item.dc:creator: Timothy Littau, NewsNation

item.title: Keyonte George scores 30 in Jazz win over Rockets
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George scored 30 points and Lauri Markkanen added 23 points and 10 rebounds to rally the Utah Jazz to a 124-115 victory over the Houston Rockets on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Water Polo: Rancho Bernardo 8, Patrick Henry 7
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)-CIF Girls Water Polo Division One title game Rancho Bernardo beat Patrick Henry wins a great game in double overtime 8-7.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Utah State sweeps San Diego State, 79-71
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For just the second time first since joining the Mountain West Conference, Utah State sweeps San Diego State. Dexter Akanno scored a career-high 26 points, making 7-of-9 three-pointers to lead the Aggies to a 79-71 win over the Aztecs Saturday night at The Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Kent Johnson scores 2 goals, the Blue Jackets beat the Blackhawks 5-1 to end a 4-game losing streak
item.description: Zach Werenski scored and had two assists and Kent Johnson scored twice for the Columbus Blue Jackets in a 5-1 victory against the Chicago Blackhawks on Saturday to end a four-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Kylie Kravig Makes History as CMU’s All-Time Assists Leader
item.description: GRAND JUNCTION, Colo. (KREX) — When the Colorado Mesa Mavericks need a play, there’s one player they trust to have the ball in her hands—Kylie Kravig. Kravig has been the floor general for the Mavericks all season, averaging six assists per game.
item.dc:creator: Titus Cleveland, KREX 5

item.title: Boys Basketball: Mission Bay 44, Torrey Pines 42
item.description: A big time matchup in boys open division quarters with a #4 and #5 seed matchup, Torrey Pines and Mission Bay.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5

item.title: Red Rocks clinch Big 12 regular season title
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The University of Utah claimed the Big 12 Conference’s first gymnastics regular-season title. The Red Rocks earned the title Friday after a 198.075-197.525 victory against Denver to go 6-0 during league play.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Thunder cruise past Jazz in first game after break
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Shai Gilgeous-Alexander scored 21 points and the West-leading Oklahoma City Thunder beat the Utah Jazz 130-107 on Friday night for their eighth victory in nine games. Chet Holmgren added 20 points for the Thunder.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Towns, Brunson help Knicks edge Bulls 113-111 in OT
item.description: NEW YORK (AP) — Karl-Anthony Towns had 32 points and 18 rebounds, Jalen Brunson added 22 points and 12 assists and the New York Knicks edged the Chicago Bulls 113-111 in overtime Thursday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Robot umpires are getting their first MLB test during spring training
item.description: TAMPA, Fla. (AP) — A computerized system that calls balls and strikes is being tested during Major League Baseball spring training exhibition games starting Thursday after four years of experiments in the minor leagues.
item.dc:creator: RONALD BLUM, Associated Press, WGN 9
